description: Phase 33 scan_recheck_cadence_enum: every claim's recheck_cadence must be one of {every_commit, daily, weekly, monthly, hourly, manual}. P17 only enforces presence; P33 narrows the free-form value to a fixed enum so a typo ('every_comit', 'week', 'daliy') can't silently cause a cadence-based scheduler to skip the claim. Extending the enum requires editing scan_recheck_cadence_enum in tool/_n6_lib — a deliberate ceremony.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_recheck_cadence_enum.json ] && jq -r "if .flagged_count == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_recheck_cadence_enum.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
